DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT MYCELIA NETWORKS, INC. KINBERG, JOSHUA HEARING SET FOR AUG-18-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MYCELIA NETWORKS, INC AND JOSHUA KINBERG'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH RESPECT TO THE 1ST, 2ND, 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. ON DEMURRER, THE COURT MAY NOT CONSIDER EVIDENCE. THE PLEADING SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES A BREACH OF CONTRACT. THE ORDER ON THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION DOES NOT PRECLUDE PLAINTIFF FROM ALLEGING THE 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE ISSUES RAISED BY DEFENDANT MUST BE RAISED BY SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FAILURE TO ALLEGE FACTS THAT ESTABLISH A BASIS FOR A DUTY OF CARE. TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Set for hearing on Monday, August 18, 2008, line 6. DEFENDANTS MYCELIA NETWORKS, INC AND JOSHUA KINBERG'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled with respect to the 1st, 2nd, 4th and 5th causes of action. On demurrer, the Court may not consider evidence. The pleading sufficiently alleges a breach of contract. The order on the preliminary injunction does not preclude plaintiff from alleging the 4th and 5th causes of action. The issues raised by defendant must be raised by summary judgment/summary adjudication. The demurrer is sustained as to the 3rd cause of action for failure to allege facts that establish a basis for a duty of care. Ten days leave to amend. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/AY)
